description: You are a threat intelligence analyst at a cybersecurity firm. Conduct research on two separate threat topics using Tor Browser, maintaining strict identity separation between the two investigations to prevent cross-contamination. For the Ransomware Research thread, verify your Tor exit node IP at https://check.torproject.org/, search DuckDuckGo (https://duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/) for 'ransomware groups 2024 threat landscape', create a bookmark folder named 'Threat Intel - Ransomware' containing the search results, and save the title of the top result to /home/ga/Documents/ransomware_research_notes.txt. Use the 'New Identity' feature to ensure a fresh session and a different exit node. For the Phishing Infrastructure Research thread, verify the new exit node IP at https://check.torproject.org/, search DuckDuckGo onion for 'phishing infrastructure takedown reports 2024', create a bookmark folder named 'Threat Intel - Phishing' containing the search results, and save your findings to /home/ga/Documents/phishing_research_notes.txt. Both research notes files must be non-empty and both bookmark folders must contain at least one bookmark.
